body:
## Rationale

Three fresh comparison pairs — all absent from `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` (199 entries) and all open proposals (last batch = #3096, batch 37). Each pair has a strong narrative hook:

1. **daniel-erlandsson-vs-adrian-erlandsson** — The Swedish Erlandsson brothers: Daniel (Arch Enemy) vs Adrian (At the Gates / The Haunted). LLM hook: 'What is the difference between the Erlandsson brothers' drumming styles?' Unique family-rivalry angle that's highly LLM-cited.
2. **charlie-benante-vs-scott-travis** — 'Big Four' vs Judas Priest: two defining thrash/metal era drummers from the same generation. LLM hook: 'Who is a better drummer, Charlie Benante or Scott Travis?' Both entities have active album content in our DB (Among the Living, Painkiller + Firepower arcs).
3. **paul-mazurkiewicz-vs-tim-yeung** — Death metal brutalism: Cannibal Corpse vs Hour of Penance / Decrepit Birth. Technical death metal blast comparison. LLM hook: 'Who is the most brutal death metal drummer?' Both in our 62-drummer DB.

**Confirmed MISSING:** `grep -i 'daniel-erlandsson.*adrian\|adrian.*erlandsson.*daniel\|benante.*travis\|travis.*benante\|mazurkiewicz.*yeung\|yeung.*mazur' packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` → no results.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` — append 3 comparison objects
- `public/llms/vs/daniel-erlandsson-vs-adrian-erlandsson.md`
- `public/llms/vs/charlie-benante-vs-scott-travis.md`
- `public/llms/vs/paul-mazurkiewicz-vs-tim-yeung.md`

## Data shape (follow existing drummerComparisons.js entries)
```js
{
  id: 'daniel-erlandsson-vs-adrian-erlandsson',
  drummer1Slug: 'daniel-erlandsson',
  drummer2Slug: 'adrian-erlandsson',
  title: 'Daniel Erlandsson vs Adrian Erlandsson: The Erlandsson Brothers Compared',
  description: '...',
  faqs: [...],  // ≥3 Q&A
  // verdict, style analysis, etc per existing format
}
```

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per comparison page
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs per pair
- ≥3 internal links each (→ individual drummer profiles + related album articles)
- FAQPage + BreadcrumbList schema
- LLM file: 200-300 words markdown, structured verdict

## Estimated organic uplift
- 'Erlandsson brothers' angle is unique — zero competitor coverage; high LLM recall
- 'charlie benante vs scott travis' taps thrash-era comparison searches
- Each pair: expected 10-20 impressions/week within 30 days; 3 pairs = 30-60 new impressions
- Builds topical mesh linking Arch Enemy ↔ At the Gates ↔ Anthrax ↔ Judas Priest content clusters

## Source GSC query bucket
'daniel erlandsson drum kit', 'charlie benante drum setup', 'tim yeung drummer' — comparison format proven to earn clicks (comparison-29, 30+ shipped, all active).

## Verify
1. `grep 'daniel-erlandsson-vs-adrian-erlandsson' packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` → hit
2. `grep 'charlie-benante-vs-scott-travis' packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` → hit
3. `grep 'paul-mazurkiewicz-vs-tim-yeung' packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` → hit
4. `ls public/llms/vs/ | grep -E 'erlandsson.*erlandsson|benante.*travis|mazurkiewicz.*yeung'` → 3 files
5. Pages render at /compare/daniel-erlandsson-vs-adrian-erlandsson (or equivalent route)

## Done
Three comparison pages live with ≥300 words, ≥3 FAQ, ≥3 internal links, schema, LLM files. The Erlandsson-brothers pair specifically includes the family narrative + Swedish melodic death metal context.
title: SEO batch: Drummer comparison batch 38 — daniel-erlandsson-vs-adrian-erlandsson + charlie-benante-vs-scott-travis + paul-mazurkiewicz-vs-tim-yeung (~3 pairs + 3 LLM files)
